name: YuMe, Inc.
description: YuMe, Inc. was a prominent independent provider of digital video brand advertising solutions, founded in 2004 and headquartered in Redwood City, California. The company specialized in data-science-driven technologies that connected advertisers, application developers, content distributors, and publishers across various digital platforms. By leveraging proprietary software, YuMe enabled brands to reach audiences effectively through video advertising. The company was publicly traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol YUME until it was acquired by RhythmOne plc in February 2018, marking a significant consolidation in the digital advertising technology sector.
